codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and full commit diff. Implementation matches the feature description/expected behavior: weak-test tightening landed, dead exports/hooks were removed or downgraded, relay normalization duplication was consolidated via normalizeRelayList with coverage, shared RELAY_EMPTY_ERROR usage was introduced, and command-metadata switch logic was unified into a descriptor table without observable behavior regressions in the diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runtime-worker guidance currently requires demo-gallery + agent-browser manual verification by default, but this feature was accepted as followedProcedure=true without either (transcript shows no agent-browser invocation and verification focused on tsc/vitest + targeted multi-device Playwright).
sharedStateObservations.suggestedChange: Clarify runtime-worker SKILL.md to explicitly allow a no-agent-browser/no-demo-gallery verification path for pure code-refactor/test-tightening features that introduce no user-visible UI behavior.
sharedStateObservations.rationale: Current procedure text and accepted execution diverge, which can cause inconsistent reviews and unnecessary validator friction.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md (runtime-worker) 'Required Skills' + 'Verify' sections vs worker transcript skeleton for session 4de449d6-6553-41d3-a508-a55c43cc728a and handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

summary: Pass: no high-confidence actionable code defects found in this feature. One shared-state observation was recorded for runtime-worker procedure clarity.
